/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libdobot_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libdobot_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/dobot_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dobot_interface/action/detail/joint_ptp__description.c.o CMakeFiles/dobot_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dobot_interface/action/detail/joint_ptp__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/dobot_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dobot_interface/action/detail/joint_ptp__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/dobot_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dobot_interface/action/detail/pose_ptp__description.c.o CMakeFiles/dobot_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dobot_interface/action/detail/pose_ptp__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/dobot_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dobot_interface/action/detail/pose_ptp__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/dobot_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dobot_interface/srv/detail/pick_and_place__description.c.o CMakeFiles/dobot_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dobot_interface/srv/detail/pick_and_place__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/dobot_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dobot_interface/srv/detail/pick_and_place__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/kilted/lib: /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
